/CAL RESENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC1170(D)/DEF APPEARS VIA TELEPHONE FROM SOANO STATE PRISON (CDC #B26077)/CTORD:MURDER CONVICTION OF COUNT 1 VACATEDAND DISMISSED/X:COURT INSTEAD FINDS THE DEFENDANT GUILTY OF THE LESSER INCLUDED OFFENSE ON COUNT 1, PC192(A), VOLUNTARY MANSLAUGHTER,AND RESENTENCESTHE DEFENDANT IN ACCORDANCE TO SENTENCING LAWS IN 1969 AS FOLLOWS:/CH2:SP15Y/DEF:IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 2 TO THE MAXIMUM TERM OF 10 YEARS, CONSECUTIVE/X:COURT STAYS THE SENTENCES ON COUNTS 3, 4, 6, 7 & 8,/DEF: IS SENTENCED ON COUNT 9 TO THE MAXIMUM TERM OF 15 YEARS, CONSECUTIVE/X:TOTAL = 40 YEARS STATE PRISON,/DEF:TO RECEIVE CREDIT FOR TIME SERVED IN THE AMOUNT TO BECALCULATD BY CDCR/2933,1(C)/CTORD:SENTENCE DEEMED SERVED/DEF:WAIVES ANYEXCESS CREDITS TO THE EXTENT OF ALLOWING A STANDARD PAROLE SUPERVISION PERIOD/DNACOMP/290/X:COURT FURTHER ORDERS RESTITUTION TO VICTIM, FINES & FEESDEEMED REMITTED,/DEF:IS NOT ELIGIBLE FOR SENTENCING PURSUANT TO PC 1170(H)/PAROLE70/PARDATE:AS DIRECTED BY CDCR/PAR70/APPEAL/
/CAL FURTHER PROCEEDINGS ON PC1170(D) PETITION (CDC #B26077)/DEF APPEARSIA TELEPHONE FROM SOLANO STATE PRISON/X:PEOPLE'S PETITION TO RESENTENCE PURSUANT TO PC1170(D)(1) IS GRANTED,/
